cases.mutation: Returns the original too-slow alpha=0.010 implementation.
Keeps the timer/event structure but samples V(vin) directly, making the repaired DUT a delayed passthrough instead of a first-order lowpass.
Uses the corrected alpha but filters 0.9 - V(vin), so the repaired response moves in the wrong direction and settles to the wrong level.
Uses the corrected recurrence until the state reaches 0.35 V, then clamps the repaired output below the required late level.

cases.description: First Order Lowpass Bugfix: scales the metric output, preserving the main path while failing measurement checks.
